name: InsiderLiveActivities
summary: Insider iOS Mobile Suite Live Activities SDK
description:
InsiderLiveActivities adds ActivityKit Live Activities tracking to the
Insider iOS Mobile Suite. The module observes per-instance push tokens,
the iOS 17.2+ push-to-start token, and activity lifecycle events, then
forwards them to the Insider backend so server-side campaigns can target
individual Live Activities. Requires the InsiderMobile core SDK 15.1.0+;
the public API is Swift-only.
